cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.31.6.0)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/external/netcdf/cmake/modules;/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/external/netcdf/cmake;/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/cmake/Modules")
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS " -D_LARGEFILE64_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "-g -Wall -Wshorten-64-to-32 -Wconversion")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/build3/netcdf_build/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-7yXZep")
add_executable(cmTC_31cfa)
target_sources(cmTC_31cfa PRIVATE
  "/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/build3/netcdf_build/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-7yXZep/CheckIncludeFile.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_31cfa_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_31cfa>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_31cfa ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
